title: FT on 'Industry': What's the world of finance really like | FT #shorts

transcript.text: I've just spoken to Aubrey at Alertton.
Why did you lie to me?
>> Your middle office. You shouldn't be
calling clients.
>> You made a mistake. So, what the do
you think you're doing?
>> 15 seconds to the print is going to be
soft. Then we're clear.
>> No, Harper. You can't trade your way out
of this. That is unacceptable. It's
reckless.
>> This is where we are now.
>> Harper,
>> just wait. The announcement's coming in
five. [music]
Big miss on the number plus 120 versus
street at plus 250.
>> What's
so we've just watched a clip from the

Harper's on the cross productduct sales
desk. She's made a mistake clearly and
she's trying to get herself out of it.
What's going on in what we've just seen?
It's very tense.

all, if we we have to make the big leap
that she would be allowed to, someone so
junior to be putting on that kind of a
trade in decent size. Oh, maybe they
allow this all the time. I doubt it. Um
because there'd be compliance issues.
But even if she was allowed to do it, um
what's going on on the scene is that

She's bought in pounds something that

briefly

there's various things that are in there

They're just chatting to clients.
They're intermediaries um trying to put

>> How do you get to become the trader? Do
